content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: She set her ___ for seven o'clock so she would not be late for work.
distractor_rationale: a blanket is a bed covering and cannot be set to wake someone up
a carpet is a floor covering and has no alarm function
a bin is a container for rubbish and cannot be set for a time

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Tom threw the empty bottle into the ___ because it was full of rubbish.
distractor_rationale: a cupboard is used to store items, not to dispose of rubbish
a bed is for sleeping and is not a container for rubbish
a chair is for sitting and cannot hold rubbish

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The child pulled the ___ over herself because she felt cold in bed at night.
distractor_rationale: a carpet covers the floor and cannot be pulled over a person in bed
a ceiling is the top surface of a room and cannot be pulled over someone
a clock shows the time and is not used to keep warm in bed

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Maria turned on the ___ and waited for the water to heat up before she got in to wash.
distractor_rationale: a bed is for sleeping and does not fill with water for washing
a cupboard stores items and cannot be filled with water
a chair is for sitting and has no function in washing

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Anna stored the extra plates and glasses in the kitchen ___ so the counter would be clear.
distractor_rationale: a bathroom is a room for washing and is not where kitchen plates are stored
a bedroom is a room for sleeping and is not used to store kitchen items
a carpet is a floor covering and cannot store plates or glasses

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: James used the ___ to boil water and fry eggs for breakfast every morning before leaving the house.
distractor_rationale: a clock shows the time and cannot boil water or fry eggs
a blanket is a bed covering and has no cooking function
a bin is for rubbish and cannot be used to prepare food

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The decorator painted the ___ white so the room would look taller and brighter from below.
distractor_rationale: a carpet is on the floor and is not painted to make a room look taller
a chair is a piece of furniture and painting it would not affect the room's height
a blanket is a fabric covering and is not part of the room structure

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Lisa moved into a small ___ on the third floor of the building, which had one bedroom and a shared laundry room.
distractor_rationale: a bathroom is a single room for washing, not a self-contained living unit with a bedroom
a cupboard is a storage unit and cannot contain a bedroom or laundry room
a bedroom is a single room for sleeping, not a complete living unit with its own floor level

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The cleaner vacuumed the ___ in the living room carefully because the thick fabric collected a lot of dust.
distractor_rationale: a ceiling is the top surface of a room and is not vacuumed with a standard vacuum cleaner
a clock is a time-keeping device and is not made of thick fabric that collects dust
a cooker is a kitchen appliance used for cooking and is not vacuumed

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: David decided to ___ a large pot of vegetable soup from scratch, chopping all the ingredients himself and adding fresh herbs at the end.
distractor_rationale: clean does not collocate with 'a pot of soup' and cannot describe the action of preparing food with ingredients and herbs
bed is a noun referring to furniture for sleeping and cannot function as a verb describing food preparation
bath is a noun or verb related to washing and cannot describe making soup with ingredients

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Tom set his ___ for seven o'clock so he would not be late for work.
distractor_rationale: a blanket is used for warmth in bed and cannot be set to ring at a specific time
a bin is a container for rubbish and has no function related to waking someone up
a carpet is a floor covering and cannot be set to display or signal a time

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: She threw the empty bottle into the ___ near the kitchen door.
distractor_rationale: a bed is for sleeping and you do not throw rubbish into it
a chair is for sitting and is not used to collect rubbish
a cupboard stores food or objects neatly and is not where you throw empty bottles away

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Maria turned on the ___ and waited for the water to get hot before she started making soup.
distractor_rationale: a bathroom is a room used for washing, not a device you turn on to heat water for cooking soup
a ceiling is the upper surface of a room and cannot be turned on or used for cooking
a blanket is a bed covering used for warmth and has no role in heating water for soup

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: James stored the extra plates and glasses in the ___ above the sink so the counter stayed clear.
distractor_rationale: a bed is a piece of furniture for sleeping and cannot be positioned above a sink to store plates
a carpet is a floor covering and cannot be used to store plates and glasses above a sink
a bath is a large tub used for washing the body and is not found above a kitchen sink

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The painter had to stand on a tall ladder to reach the ___ and cover the water stain left by the leak.
distractor_rationale: a carpet lies on the floor and cannot be reached by climbing a ladder to cover a stain caused by a roof leak
a blanket is a soft bed covering and is not a surface in a room that a painter would stand on a ladder to paint
a cupboard is a storage unit fixed to a wall or floor and is not the overhead surface where a water stain from a leak would appear

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: She put the dirty clothes in the ___ to wash them.
distractor_rationale: a cupboard is for storing items, not for washing clothes
a blanket is a bed covering, not a container for laundry
a carpet is a floor covering, not a container for anything

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Tom looked at the ___ on the wall to check what time it was.
distractor_rationale: a carpet is on the floor and cannot show the time
a ceiling is the top surface of a room, not a time-telling device
a blanket is a bed covering and cannot show the time

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The child was tired, so she went to her ___ to sleep.
distractor_rationale: a chair is for sitting, not for sleeping
a cooker is a kitchen appliance for cooking food, not for sleeping
a cupboard is a storage unit, not a place to sleep

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Maria turned on the ___ and waited for the water to get hot before she stepped in.
distractor_rationale: a cooker is used for cooking food, not for filling with hot water to step into
a carpet is a floor covering that one does not fill with water
a ceiling is the top surface of a room and cannot be turned on or stepped into

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: James opened the ___ under the sink and took out the cleaning products stored inside.
distractor_rationale: a blanket is a soft bed covering and cannot be opened to store cleaning products
a carpet is fixed to the floor and is not a storage space
a clock is a time-telling device and does not store anything inside it

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The new ___ in the living room is very soft and comfortable to walk on in bare feet.
distractor_rationale: a ceiling is fixed overhead and cannot be walked on in a living room
a blanket is a bed covering and is not laid across a floor for walking on
a clock is a time-telling device and is not something you walk on

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Sara pulled the ___ over herself because the room was cold during the night.
distractor_rationale: a carpet is fixed to the floor and cannot be pulled over a person for warmth
a cupboard is a solid storage unit that cannot be pulled over someone
a cooker is a kitchen appliance and cannot be used to cover someone for warmth

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The painter had to stand on a ladder to reach the ___ and cover the large brown stain above the light fitting.
distractor_rationale: a carpet is on the floor and a painter would not need a ladder to reach it
a cupboard is a storage unit at standing height, not above a light fitting overhead
a chair is a piece of furniture at floor level, not a surface above a light fitting

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Anna rents a small ___ on the fourth floor of a building in the city centre, which includes a kitchen and one bedroom.
distractor_rationale: a bathroom is a single room inside a home, not a complete living space that includes a kitchen and bedroom
a bedroom is a single room for sleeping, not a complete living space with its own kitchen
a cupboard is a storage unit, not a self-contained living space on a floor of a building

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: David used the ___ to boil water and fry eggs for breakfast before leaving for work.
distractor_rationale: a clock tells the time and cannot be used to boil water or fry eggs
a cupboard is a storage unit and cannot apply heat to cook food
a bin is used to dispose of waste and cannot be used to boil water or fry eggs

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The kitchen floor is very ___. (DIRT)

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: She is a good ___ and always makes delicious meals for her family. (COOK)

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Tom did a thorough ___ of the bathroom before the guests arrived on Saturday. (CLEAN)

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The living room felt warm and ___ because of the thick carpet and soft blankets on the sofa. (COMFORT)

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The ___ of the old apartment was so low that tall people had to be careful not to hit their heads on the light fittings. (CEIL)
